work_items.title: E2E simulation shows user LOSES FDRY under both slippage regimes
inputs_from_cycle1: HODL-FDRY baseline = 1.00x
Breakeven vs HODL-FDRY needs ~32% annualized; backtest = 20%
Current pool: $80k + $40k bootstrap = $120k; needs ~$500k TVL
Three paths: (a) grow pool, (b) market honestly, (c) pivot to Track 2 SOL/USDC entry
outputs_expected: Path selection documented in SPEC §1 positioning
If (c): FDRY-entry retained as opt-in with explicit loss warning
If (b): deposit cap ≤$200 per user
If (a): pre-launch TVL target ~$500k

work_items.title: Symmetry creator/management fees DISABLED at protocol level
inputs_from_cycle1: SPEC §8 claims 2% creator fee = ~$400/yr at $20k AUM
Symmetry global config has management-class fees disabled
Net-to-creator today = $0/yr
Withdrawal fee 50bp stays in NAV (benefits holders, not creator)
outputs_expected: SPEC §8 marks creator fee as accrues-to-$0 until global flag flips
SYMMETRY.md fee table Creator row: status 'architecturally live; currently disabled at global config'
Pre-launch checklist item: call symmetry.fetchGlobalConfig() on mainnet
side_effects: Personal income thesis revisited; only host fee or waiting viable today
